productDisplayName: FILA Men Dls Nitrous White Sports Shoes
description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila DLS Nitrous makes for a great casual shoe and running trainer. Packed with features and crafted in a low profile silhouette, this shoe makes for a great buy.UpperHeavily meshed upper with strategically placed synthetic leather overlays for absolute breathable comfort and shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded tongue and collar with a textile lining for a custom fit and enhanced breathable comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionDynamic landing system in the heel for enhanced shock absorption OutsoleTPR outsole with waffle pattern and X-shaped lugs for absolute grip and traction and easy heel strike to toe off motionFlex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
